name: The Rolling Bones Alley
text:
The Rolling Bones Alley enters the battlefield tapped.
When The Rolling Bones Alley enters the battlefield, roll a six-sided die. On a 6, create a Treasure token. On a 1, it deals 1 damage to you as a die clatters off the wall and hits you.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.
flavorText: Down the alley behind the funnel-cake stand, the dice never stop clicking against the brick.

extras.dice: ETB roll for upside or a nick
